name: diag-edges-straight
description: Diagnostic — force edges to straight via setPerfSettings, capture. If straight shows but bezier doesn't, the bezier sampler is broken.

commands: (async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 800)); const r = window.__qualiaRenderer; if (!r) return { error: 'no renderer' }; r.setPerfSettings({ edgeShape: 'straight', edgeWidthPx: 6 }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); const sm = r.getSceneManager(); const em = sm.edgeMesh; return { shape: em.globalShape, count: em.count, lineWidth: em.lineSegments.material.linewidth, opacity: em.lineSegments.material.opacity, resolution: em.lineSegments.material.resolution.toArray() }; })()
